item.title: Pentagon awards $2.3B contract for next-gen fighter
item.description: The Pentagon announced a major contract award Wednesday.

item.title: Army seeks proposals for logistics software platform
item.description: RFP expected within 60 days for a new logistics platform supporting CONUS depots.

item.title: Item with no publication date
item.description: This item has no pubDate element.

item.title: Very old story that should be filtered out
item.description: This is from 2020 and should not appear in recent results.
